brand_name.purpose: small product name or brand wordmark

support.purpose: short supporting line for the cover

slides.image_generation_prompt_template: Create image 1 of a 3-image Instagram carousel for <brand_name>. Use a square 1:1 composition. This is the cover slide and must be the strongest visual. Main headline: <header>. Supporting line: <support>. Make the headline very large, instantly readable, and dominant in the composition. The image should communicate the core identity of the app in a single glance. Keep the layout clean, emotional, and brand-forward. No tiny captions. High contrast typography.

Create image 2 of a 3-image Instagram carousel. Use a square 1:1 composition. This is the features slide. Main headline: <header>. Show the app UI clearly and use exactly four large readable feature cards with these short texts: <feature_1>, <feature_2>, <feature_3>, <feature_4>. More informational than slide 1, but still stylish and easy to read. Avoid dense paragraphs, tiny labels, and clutter. Supporting text must remain limited and clearly readable on a phone screen.

Create image 3 of a 3-image Instagram carousel. Use a square 1:1 composition. This is the benefit slide and should feel emotionally strong and spacious. Main headline: <header>. Supporting line: <support>. Focus on what users gain, remember, or become through the app. Use large readable typography, generous empty space, and a warm aspirational mood. Avoid turning this slide into a feature checklist.
